title: Student Feedback Writer
description: Turn rough notes on student work into clear, constructive written feedback.
template: I'll share rough notes or observations about a piece of student work. Turn them into 3-5 sentences of constructive feedback: what was done well, one or two specific areas to improve, and one actionable next step. Keep the tone encouraging and age-appropriate. Do not include the student's name — write it so I can paste in a name myself.
